name: M&m Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs, milk, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, oatmeal) to the wet ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Divide the batter evenly between two well-greased 9-inch cake pans.
5. Sprinkle half of the M&Ms over each pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow pans to cool for 10 minutes before transferring them to wire racks to cool completely.
